inline_comments.message: `replicaCount` should be at least 2 (as was in vid-mariadb-galera/values.yaml)

replicaCount was 2 in vid-mariadb-galera/values.yaml but it was overriden by this line (which is untouched on this review).
For example, here's the result of daily master:
kubectl get po -n onap | grep vid
onap-vid-vid-64569f57cf-nt6rz                                2/2     Running            0          8h
onap-vid-vid-galera-config-qmtcv                             0/1     Completed          0          8h
onap-vid-vid-galera-config-w4jll                             0/1     Init:Error         0          8h
onap-vid-vid-mariadb-galera-0                                1/1     Running            0          8h

In https://galeracluster.com/library/documentation/weighted-quorum.html, we can see:

n order to enable automatic failovers, you need to use at least three nodes. Bear in mind that this scales out to other levels of infrastructure, for the same reasons.

Single switch clusters should use a minimum of 3 nodes.
Clusters spanning switches should use a minimum of 3 switches.
Clusters spanning networks should use a minimum of 3 networks.
Clusters spanning data centers should use a minimum of 3 data centers.


So if you want not to have a cluster of 1 per default, we should move to 3.
After, this is a transient solution as I want to move vid database(s) into common galera cluster which has 3 nodes.

So it's up to you :)

I would like to go with 3, then.
If you think it risks the efforts up to here, we can take it separately, at a different change.

I'm happy that you pinpointed the config here, as I was sure we're h/a already.
